title: Warden of the Firewall
description: The party hits the Firewall at the boundary of Node Prime's secured sector. Access denied. Authorization must be demonstrated through force.

lines: The barrier at the edge of the secured sector was not a wall. It was the concept of a wall expressed in pure denial.
Green text scrolled across it in columns too fast to read. Then the text stopped. All of it, at once, mid-scroll.
A figure coalesced at the center of the barrier. Not stepping through it. Assembling from it.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Firewall
lines.text: Authorization: insufficient. Credentials: unrecognized. Purpose: anomalous. Origin: undefined. ACCESS DENIED.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: Is there a form? A process?

lines.speaker: Warden of the Firewall
lines.text: The process is authorization. Authorization is proof. Proof is demonstrated. The Calibrant's system recognizes one form of proof for entities of your classification.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Firewall
lines.text: Force. Prove your authorization through force. If you can pass me, you are authorized. This is not a contradiction. Authorization is the capacity to pass. The firewall tests capacity.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Firewall
lines.text: Every prior entity that attempted this sector was denied. I have been here since the first packet was routed. I have not been passed.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Everything we've done in this world has been about proving we belong. Even when there was no one to prove it to.
